actionUnits.condition: Trigger AttackPlayer by placing the player target within both sightRange and attackRange. Enemy Type 5 has CapsuleCollider (id: 1306247219) and Rigidbody, so Trigger is valid. The exact script settings come from the EnemyAi MonoBehaviour components attached in-scene (script guid: 16000b3396174ab49b4983590de64f34). Component IDs and configs: [614338935: sightRange=8, attackRange=6, timeBetweenAttacks=0.5, forceforward=10, health=10], [1888436447: same as 614338935], [1640000274: sightRange=10, attackRange=7, timeBetweenAttacks=0.75, forceforward=15, health=5], [1646766445: same as 1640000274], [1673477538: same as 614338935]. Expected behavior when condition met: agent stops, faces player, plays 'Gun Fire', instantiates projectile at Attackpoint (fileID: 2913934810850566424), applies forward/up impulse, sets alreadyAttacked true and auto-resets after timeBetweenAttacks.

Attack event via proximity. Ensure GameObject.Find("Camera Offset") (id: 4940586919770313183) resolves so EnemyAi.player is set in Awake. After moving Enemy Type 5 to approx (0,0,0), it should be within both sightRange and attackRange for all attached EnemyAi MonoBehaviours (guid: 16000b3396174ab49b4983590de64f34). Component configs: [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538] sightRange=8, attackRange=6, timeBetweenAttacks=0.5, forceforward=10, health=10; [1640000274, 1646766445] sightRange=10, attackRange=7, timeBetweenAttacks=0.75, forceforward=15, health=5. Expected automatic behavior during this hold: agent stops and faces player, AudioManager.Play("Gun Fire"), projectile instantiated at Attackpoint (fileID: 2913934810850566424) with forward/up forces, alreadyAttacked set then auto-reset via Invoke after timeBetweenAttacks.

Chase event via visibility only. At ~8 units from Camera Offset the enemy should be outside attackRange (max 7) but within sightRange (min 8) for EnemyAi components [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538, 1640000274, 1646766445]. Expected automatic behavior: EnemyAi.ChasePlayer path runs, NavMeshAgent.SetDestination(player.position), LookAt constrained to yaw.

Patrol event via no visibility. At ~38+ units from Camera Offset the enemy should be outside both sightRange and attackRange for all EnemyAi components [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538, 1640000274, 1646766445]. Expected automatic behavior: Patroling() runs, SearchWalkPoint() may set walkPoint when Raycast on whatIsGround (m_Bits 2048) succeeds, NavMeshAgent.SetDestination(walkPoint) until within 1f, then walkPointSet=false.

Acknowledge presence of XR locomotion providers (ActionBasedContinuousMoveProvider enabled id: 5669860208052943631; Snap/Turn providers disabled). No direct input simulation; used only to ensure XR rig systems are active while EnemyAi queries the player.
Acknowledge presence of XR locomotion providers (ActionBasedSnapTurnProvider enabled id: 8256176680690771125). No direct controller interaction performed.

Force AttackPlayer by placing the player within both sightRange and attackRange near (0,0,0). EnemyAi settings in-scene (script guid: 16000b3396174ab49b4983590de64f34) — components: [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538] sightRange=8, attackRange=6, timeBetweenAttacks=0.5, forceforward=10, health=10; [1640000274, 1646766445] sightRange=10, attackRange=7, timeBetweenAttacks=0.75, forceforward=15, health=5. Expected behavior: agent halts, faces player; AudioManager.Play("Gun Fire"); Instantiate projectile prefab 'Laser' (fileID: 6845118643277486568) at Attackpoint (fileID: 2913934810850566424); apply forward/up impulses; alreadyAttacked toggles then auto-resets via Invoke to permit repeat fire within the 1.6s window.

ChasePlayer via visibility only. At ~8 units from Camera Offset, outside attackRange (max 7) but within sightRange (>=8). Expected: NavMeshAgent.SetDestination(player.position), constrained yaw LookAt.

Patroling by being outside both ranges for all EnemyAi components. Expected: SearchWalkPoint() picks random walkPoint on whatIsGround (m_Bits: 2048); NavMeshAgent.SetDestination(walkPoint) until within 1f then walkPointSet=false.
